summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Ike Instrumental Marching Band CMS. All 12 requested features verified working. 15 backend tests pass, all frontend flows confirmed.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py CORS: secure=False on cookie — acceptable for preview but should be True in production
No brute-force lockout after 5 failed login attempts (playbook requirement) — minor security gap
context_for_next_testing_agent: All CMS flows verified: admin login/logout, wrong password error, announcement update reflected on public site, all 5 admin tabs load, GET /api/content returns valid JSON, POST /api/auth/admin-login returns 200/401 correctly, PUT /api/content requires auth. Contact form has Formspree ID meewbkry. Schedule and About sections are dynamic from ContentContext.
passed_tests: Admin login at /admin with correct password Er!2Gx9kL4 succeeds and shows admin panel
Admin login with wrong password shows 'INVALID PASSWORD' error
Announcement banner shows 'Upcoming Event: Leadership Camp – June 24' from ContentContext
Admin panel tabs: Announcement, About, Schedule, Media & Images, Contact all load
Admin changes announcement text → saves → public site banner updates immediately
Admin logout redirects back to login page
Contact form has all fields and uses Formspree ID meewbkry
Schedule section shows rehearsals/games/competitions from backend content
About section text is dynamic from content API
GET /api/content returns valid JSON with all required keys
POST /api/auth/admin-login correct password returns 200 + sets access_token cookie
